message: Add syslog Integration ref to CEF and LEEF operators/functions

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ category: Parsing
 example: 'read_cef'
 ---
 
+import Fn from '@components/see-also/Fn.astro';
+import Op from '@components/see-also/Op.astro';
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Parses an incoming Common Event Format (CEF) stream into events.
 
 ```tql
@@ -64,11 +68,7 @@ import ParsingOptions from '@partials/operators/ParsingOptions.mdx';
 
 ## See Also
 
-**Functions:**
-
-- [`parse_cef`](/reference/functions/parse_cef)
-- [`print_cef`](/reference/functions/print_cef)
-
-**Operators:**
-
-- [`read_leef`](/reference/operators/read_leef)
+- <Op>read_leef</Op>
+- <Fn>parse_cef</Fn>
+- <Fn>print_cef</Fn>
+- <Integration>syslog</Integration>

@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ category: Parsing
 example: 'read_leef'
 ---
 
+import Fn from '@components/see-also/Fn.astro';
+import Op from '@components/see-also/Op.astro';
+import Integration from '@components/see-also/Integration.astro';
+
 Parses an incoming [LEEF][leef] stream into events.
 
 ```tql
@@ -76,13 +80,9 @@ import ParsingOptions from '@partials/operators/ParsingOptions.mdx';
 
 ## See Also
 
-**Functions:**
-
-- [`parse_leef`](/reference/functions/parse_leef)
-- [`print_leef`](/reference/functions/print_leef)
-
-**Operators:**
-
-- [`read_cef`](/reference/operators/read_cef)
-- [`read_syslog`](/reference/operators/read_syslog)
-- [`write_syslog`](/reference/operators/write_syslog)
+- <Op>read_cef</Op>
+- <Op>read_syslog</Op>
+- <Op>write_syslog</Op>
+- <Fn>parse_leef</Fn>
+- <Fn>print_leef</Fn>
+- <Integration>syslog</Integration>
